April 8th, 2025. Various IRIS Windows and Linux servers will be patched and rebooted Tuesday or Wednesday. PRINT, WINTERM and WDS will automatically patch and reboot Wednesday, April 9th, at 3:00am. WINTERM may be unavailable until 10:00am Wednesday

n-mfa.eecs will be patched and rebooted Wednesday night. DNS servers cronus, themis, and rhea may also be briefly unavailable while rebooting at approximately 8:00pm Tuesday. On Wednesday, April 9th, the departmental DHCP server is scheduled for down

the departmental DHCP server is scheduled for downtime from 10pm to 10:30pm (actual downtime is expected to be shorter than scheduled). [Read more…] about April IRIS Server Patching We will be performing various network maintenance activities through

ing various network maintenance activities throughout the day on Wednesday, March 26th during the previously announced Soda Hall 2nd floor power shutdown. We expect that most of our work will not affect wired and wi-fi network service, however there

ct wired and wi-fi network service, however there will be some brief outages as described below. Between 12PM and 1PM on the 26th, the areas listed below will experience at least one interruption to network connectivity. We expect most of these inter

etwork connectivity. We expect most of these interruptions to be under one minute in length, but some wi-fi service may be unavailable for 5-10 minutes. BWRC (wired and wi-fi) BiD in HMMB (EECS wired) Soda Hall all floors (wi-fi) Soda Hall 4F north s

Soda Hall all floors (wi-fi) Soda Hall 4F north side, 5F-7F (wired and wi-fi) Update 15:44: This work has been completed and all networks are online. Please contact us at help@eecs.berkeley.edu if you notice any issues. Following up on the work done

u notice any issues. Following up on the work done during the June 13th Soda Hall power outage , we have a similar outage for the second floor of Soda Hall scheduled during Spring Break, to complete (hopefully!) a circuit breaker replacement. As with

hopefully!) a circuit breaker replacement. As with the last outage, electrical power to the Soda Hall second floor will be down during much of the day on Wednesday, March 26, 2025. Critical systems will be down from about 6am until perhaps 5pm. Of pr

ll be down from about 6am until perhaps 5pm. Of primary note is that the department NetApp fileservers will be down, so any systems that depend on HOME or PROJECT storage will be shutdown or nonfunctional. Services that will be unavailable during the

onal. Services that will be unavailable during the maintenance period include: department webservice (including people.eecs, www2.eecs and all other IRIS-hosted web sites), IRIS account & network forms, login servers (login.eecs, login-mfa.eecs, wint

s, login servers (login.eecs, login-mfa.eecs, winterm.eecs), print server print.eecs, and outgoing SMTP server smtp.eecs. Any systems that remain powered-on but make use of HOME or PROJECT storage may become unresponsive during this time. Rebooting a

become unresponsive during this time. Rebooting after maintenance is completed is usually recommended. Services that will remain online and available include: DHCP, EECS Active Directory, EECS LDAP, wired networking, DNS (cronus.eecs), and maillists

wired networking, DNS (cronus.eecs), and maillists (lists.eecs), and the main department website eecs.berkeley.edu. [Read more…] about Soda Hall 2nd Floor Power Outage on March 26, 2025 Microsoft will release their patches for the month on Tuesday, M

ximately 8:00pm Tuesday. On Wednesday, March 12th, the departmental DHCP server is scheduled for downtime from 10pm to 10:30pm (actual downtime is expected to be shorter than scheduled). [Read more…] about March IRIS Server Patching Cory Hall network

about March IRIS Server Patching Cory Hall networks were unstable today between approx. 9:25AM – 11:00AM due to an apparent misbehaving end-user device on the 4th floor. We have temporarily removed this device from the network and all networks are st

is device from the network and all networks are stable at this time. Please contact us at help@eecs.berkeley.edu if you notice any issues or have any questions. The IRIS authenticated SMTP relay gateway.eecs.berkeley.edu was upgraded this morning to

ay.eecs.berkeley.edu was upgraded this morning to a new operating system and mail software. The suggested configuration for the new server is: name: gateway.eecs.berkeley.edu port: 587 Encryption: STARTTLS Authentication method: normal password Usern

RTTLS Authentication method: normal password Username: your IRIS username (e.g. robm) Password: your IRIS password The old server apparently accepted email addresses for the username (e.g. robm@eecs.berkeley.edu) but this does not work on the new ser

erkeley.edu) but this does not work on the new servers. If you are having problems authenticating, please check your Username configuration. Microsoft will release their patches for the month on Tuesday, February 11th, 2025. Various IRIS Windows and

We have been experiencing campus-level network instability since sometime around midnight, which is affecting the EECS and BWRC networks. Network team is investigating and working with the vendor to restore full network connectivity. Update 2/11 6:4

restore full network connectivity. Update 2/11 6:41AM: The campus network team resolved these issues late Friday evening and our monitoring indicates that the network has been stable since. Please contact help@eecs.berkeley.edu if you notice any ongo
